text.config.accessories_compat.option.ad: Adds a Pocket slot which emulates the Curio Slot
text.config.accessories_compat.option.du: Useful when an error within trinkets occurs due to null value and such behavior leads to crashing
text.config.accessories_compat.option.sh: Shows the pocket slot in the tooltip if not implicitly valid for the slot
text.config.accessories_compat.option.sl: Useful when needing to redirect a trinket slot to a conventional accessories slot type
text.config.accessories_compat.title: Accessories Compat Config
